subcodes.title: Address to L'Alliance Spiritualiste on 1913-02-21
subcodes.first_line: We observe that every movement which establishes unity and amity brings in its train life
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @teachings as spirit of the age, @universal peace; world unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @war and peace, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @unity in diversity
